'''Naroon Cuthus''' was [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] for [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]]. When he finally retired, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] ordered Cuthus's assassination, lest he spill secrets to Jabba's enemies. Prior to his demise, Cuthus memorably persuaded the [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]] [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] to accept a lifetime contract under the terms of which [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|his band]] would perform exclusively for Jabba in return for free [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]].

The [[Death/Legends|death]] of Cuthus led to a competition between a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] named [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] and a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Bidlo Kwerve/Legends|Bidlo Kwerve]] for the post of Jabba's right-hand man.
